zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis Faucigny於1030年之前出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福時，他的父親Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny39歲，母親Lady Aalgut de Faucigny35歲。他於大約1053年與Thietburga Savoie在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福福奧尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis Faucigny于1030年之前出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福时，他的父亲Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny39岁，母亲Lady Aalgut de Faucigny35岁。他于大约1053年与Thietburga Savoie在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福福奧尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis Faucigny was born before 1030, in Geneva, Geneva, Switzerland, his father, Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny, was 39 and his mother, Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, was 35. He married Thietburga Savoie about 1053, in Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis Faucigny est né avant 1030, à Genève, Genève, Suisse, son père, Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Thietburga Savoie environ 1053, à Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis Faucigny vor 1030 in Genf, Genf, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny 39 und seine Mutter Lady Aalgut de Faucigny 35. Er hat um 1053 in Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Thietburga Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis Faucigny è nato il prima del 1030 nel Ginevra, Ginevra, Svizzera, il suo padre, Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Thietburga Savoie circa 1053, nel Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis Faucignyが1030年以前にスイスジェンeブジェンeブで生まれた時，父Lord Ermenrad II de Faucignyは39歳，母Lady Aalgut de Faucignyは35歳であった。約1053年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイファウシグニーでThietburga Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis Faucigny(이)가 1030년 이전 스위스 e브 e브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Aalgut de Faucigny(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1053년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 파시그니에서 Thietburga Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis Faucigny nasceu antes 1030, em Genève, Genève, Suiça, seu pai, Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Thietburga Savoie aproximadamente 1053, em Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis Faucigny родился перед 1030 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Thietburga Savoie около 1053 г. в местности фаусигни, хауте-савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis Faucigny nació antes de 1030, en Genève, Genève, Suiza, su papá, Lord Ermenrad II de Faucigny, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Aalgut de Faucigny, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Thietburga Savoie aproximadamente 1053, en Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
